scripts.android:apk:citizen: cd apps/citizen-mobile/android && NODE_ENV=development ./gradlew assembleDebug && cd ../../.. && cp apps/citizen-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk apps/citizen-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/signal-citizen-debug.apk
scripts.android:apk:patrol: cd apps/patrol-mobile/android && NODE_ENV=development ./gradlew assembleDebug && cd ../../.. && cp apps/patrol-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk apps/patrol-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/signal-patrol-debug.apk
scripts.android:release:citizen: cd apps/citizen-mobile/android && NODE_ENV=production ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd ../../.. && cp apps/citizen-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk apps/citizen-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/signal-citizen-release.apk
scripts.android:release:patrol: cd apps/patrol-mobile/android && NODE_ENV=production ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd ../../.. && cp apps/patrol-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk apps/patrol-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/signal-patrol-release.apk
scripts.android:release:all: corepack pnpm android:release:citizen && corepack pnpm android:release:patrol
